prompt: A realistic scene of a student sitting alone at a desk in an exam hall. The floor and surrounding desks are covered with hundreds of identical blank or pattern-like sheets with no readable text, arranged in a repetitive and uniform way, representing memorized practice. In front of the student lies a single paper that looks slightly different in structure or layout from all the others. The student appears confused and stuck, staring at the unfamiliar paper. The lighting highlights the repetitive pattern around and contrasts it with the unique paper. No text, no words, no symbols, purely physical and realistic, cinematic lighting, high detail.
metaphor: A student memorizes identical practice papers but fails when the exam paper differs slightly, showing inability to generalize.
